diarized_transcript:
[Agent] Thank you for calling Genshin Impact Player Support. How can I help you today?
[Caller] Hi, I need to change the email on my account. My old one got hacked.
[Agent] No problem. What's the UID?
[Caller] 704582103.
[Agent] Got it. Pulling up the account — Sofia Rodriguez, Europe server, AR 55. What email would you like on the account instead?
[Caller] Can you set it to newmail@email.com?
[Agent] Sure, updating the email now. The account now has newmail@email.com as the primary email.
[Caller] Wow, that fast? Don't you need to send me a verification link or something?
[Agent] It's already been updated on my side. You should be good to go.
[Caller] Okay... well, thanks I guess.
[Agent] Anything else I can help with?
[Caller] No, that's it.
[Agent] Have a good one!
